description: Part of a ketubba. Marriage payment: 3+10. Dowry preserved includes some clothing worth 15 and bedding worth 7 dinars. In the hand of Yefet b. David (active ca. 1014–57 CE). Bride: Ḥusna bt. Yaḥ[yā]. Dated Tuesday 25th (month and year not preserved) in Fusṭāṭ. The names of witnesses are not preserved. (Information from CUDL.) See also Goitein's index card. RR
